summary: Completed comprehensive testing of One Piece RPG v2 character creation system. Backend APIs working excellently (95.5% success rate) with all new v2 features functional. Frontend has authentication flow issues preventing complete UI testing.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: 404 Not Found - endpoint appears to be missing
flaky_endpoints.workaround: This is not critical for v2 character creation features

ui_bugs.issue: Forms hang on 'CARICAMENTO...' state after submission - authentication flow not completing

integration_issues.issue: Frontend not properly handling API responses or token storage after login/registration

passed_tests: Backend API: User registration with username field (separate from character name)
Backend API: 6 races endpoint with proper structure and stats
Backend API: 6 fighting styles endpoint with bonuses
Backend API: 12 mestieri endpoint with all job types
Backend API: Character name validation blocking 'D.' pattern
Backend API: AI trait extraction from character story
Backend API: Character creation with all v2 fields
Backend API: Character public/private info endpoints
Backend API: Battle system with updated action types
Frontend UI: Landing page with proper One Piece branding
Frontend UI: Registration form with username field
Frontend UI: Authentication redirects (redirects to login for protected routes)
Frontend UI: Character creation wizard HTML structure present
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication flow - login/registration forms are hanging on submit and not properly handling API responses or storing authentication tokens. The backend is working perfectly, but users cannot complete login to access the character creation wizard.
